responseMessageContents.text: System says this is a NEW project, default platform swift. But user wants Expo APK and says don't mix Kotlin. The createApp framework options are react-native, swift, kotlin, web. The user says "expo go native". I think "expo" maps to react-native framework in createApp. But the system says default swift. However, the user explicitly says "expo go native". React Native is deprecated? Actually platforms skill says react-native is only valid when project originally started with React Native. Since this is a new project, createApp will reject react-native on first attempt? Wait skill says: "react-native is only valid when the project was originally started with React Native; the call
